Description

    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    JdbcArrayColumns.DefaultSupport
    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Default ArrayColumns implementation for dialects that do not support array-typed columns.

    Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
    Default ArrayColumns implementation for dialects that do not support array-typed columns.

    Modifier and Type

    Description

    Methods in org.springframework.data.jdbc.core.dialect that return JdbcArrayColumns
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static JdbcArrayColumns
    JdbcArrayColumns.defaultSupport()
    Returns the default JdbcArrayColumns support.
    default JdbcArrayColumns
    JdbcDialect.getArraySupport()
    Returns the JDBC-specific array support object that describes how this dialect supports array-typed columns.
    static JdbcArrayColumns
    JdbcDialect.getArraySupport(Dialect dialect)
    Returns the array support for the given Dialect.
    JdbcArrayColumns
    JdbcH2Dialect.getArraySupport()
     
    JdbcArrayColumns
    JdbcHsqlDbDialect.getArraySupport()
     
    JdbcArrayColumns
    JdbcOracleDialect.getArraySupport()
     
    JdbcArrayColumns
    JdbcPostgresDialect.getArraySupport()
     
    static JdbcArrayColumns
    JdbcArrayColumns.unsupported()
    Returns an JdbcArrayColumns instance indicating that arrays are not supported by a JdbcDialect.
